title: Update on Building Collapse: 33 people retrieved 30 hours into rescue operation
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A multi-disciplinary rescue team of more than 200 emergency services personnel are continuing to conduct rescue operations and as of 19:40 this evening, 7 May 2024, seven (7) patients have been declared deceased.


> Thirty-three (33) people have been removed from the rubble of the collapsed multi-story construction site at 75 Victoria Street, leaving 42 persons unaccounted for.


Seventy-five (75) construction workers were present on the site at the time of the collapse which occurred at 14:09 on Monday 6 May and the rescue operation is now approaching 30 hours as of 20:00 today, 7 May.

An update will be issued at 21:00, 7 May 2024 - South African Time.

Emergency workers hold blankets as a deceased person is pulled from the rubble. Photo: Michelle Pienaar

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
